/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -O2 -shared -Wl,-soname,libmymuduo.so -o libmymuduo.so CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/Acceptor.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/Buffer.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/Channel.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/CurrentThread.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/DefaultPoller.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/EPollPoller.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/EventLoop.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/EventLoopThread.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/EventLoopThreadPool.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/InetAddress.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/Poller.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/Socket.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/TcpConnectiong.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/TcpServer.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/Thread.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/Timestamp.cc.o CMakeFiles/mymuduo.dir/logger.cc.o
